description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a striking red, black, and white color scheme. The aircraft features a high-mounted straight wing with prominent black and white stripes, supported by diagonal struts connecting to the lower fuselage. The fuselage is streamlined and tapers toward the tail, which has a conventional tail design with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, typical of a taildragger configuration. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a dark canopy or windshield.
description: A small, high-wing, single-propeller airplane with a red, black, and white color scheme, fixed taildragger landing gear, and a streamlined fuselage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-mounted wing, propeller, and the symmetrical landing gear struts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight wing, propeller, and the taildragger landing gear with visible wheel.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, color pattern on the wings and tail, and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, wing, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing configuration with straight, rectangular wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single-seat.
